headline: Why The Aflac (AFL) Investment Story Is Shifting On Mixed Analyst Targets And New Risks
summary: Aflac’s fair value estimate has been nudged to about US$113.00 from US$111.69, a small adjustment that still matters if you are tracking where analysts think the shares should land over time. That shift sits within a wider mix of bullish and cautious research, with some firms lifting long term price targets while others trim theirs as they reassess sector headwinds through 2027 and 2028. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative could shape the way you monitor Aflac from...

headline: Is Aflac Incorporated Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: Aflac Incorporated has underperformed the Dow Jones Industrial Average over the past year. On top of that, Wall Street analysts have a tepid view of it.
